title: Review: relay round 18
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — subscription_active string-sniffing (nie-qgag.5) allows auth bypass in edge case; GROUP_LEAVE silent to peers (nie-qgag.2) makes group state diverge; unbounded key package blobs (nie-qgag.3) enable storage DoS; no per-user invoice cap (nie-qgag.4) enables table inflation.
Confidence: 25% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: cannot run the code to test edge cases in payment_watcher block stream error paths; cannot fully trace add_group_member_capped DEFERRED vs IMMEDIATE SQLite behavior without running concurrent tests; redis-bus feature path untested. Would raise confidence with: integration test that verifies GROUP_LEAVE notifies remaining members; a test that sends 1 MiB key package and verifies rejection; a fuzzer on the subscription_active string-match path.
